name: The New Killer
description:
A new killer joins the ranks. Will it be you, or will you join the survivors to find out who it is?

Cast:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

Slasher/Jason, Gasharpoon, John Doe, Mafioso, 1x1x1x1, Noli.

I don't know what to say about this one. No OCs this time, just the silly guys and death games.

As always this bot works better with Proxy, my other bots have the link, I'm lazy to grab it again.

I've just added Noli! How I did this one, was I added in his description but not added him to the starting message. That way, if you as the user are a survivor, Noli will be entering as the new killer. But if you as the user come in as a killer, the bot SHOULD assume that Noli was taking a nap. I have no idea if this will work so feedback is appreciated!
creator: Subconscious
